length.min: Length must not be less than {value} cm
length.max: Length must not be more than {value} cm
length.integer: Length must be a whole number

width.min: Width must not be less than {value} cm
width.max: Width must not be more than {value} cm
width.integer: Width must be a whole number

width-unfolded.max: Unfolded width must not be more than {value} cm
width-unfolded.integer: Unfolded width must be a whole number

width-folded.max: Folded width must not be more than {value} cm

no-matches.title: No matching vehicles found
no-matches.description: Please try adjusting the parameters you entered.

CompatibilityForm.length-description: If the wheelchair footrest is removable and you want to load it without the footrest, please enter the length of the wheelchair without the footrest.
CompatibilityForm.scooter-length-hint: Up to 142cm length possible. Up to 145cm in exceptional cases
CompatibilityForm.scooter-width-hint: Up to 82cm width possible as standard
CompatibilityForm.width-unfolded-description: The unfolded width only matters if you want to load your wheelchair unfolded. If you only want to load it folded, you can simply enter 20 cm there.
CompatibilityForm.width-folded-description: By default we assume a folded width of 35 cm. If you don't see any loading options, enter 35 cm here – we can then discuss together how we can reduce the folded width of your wheelchair, or whether it also works with a larger folded width.
CompatibilityForm.loading-space-locked-hint: For this wheelchair type, only loading in the trunk is possible.
CompatibilityForm.loading-space-locked-hint-compressible: For this wheelchair type, only loading in the trunk is generally possible. For selected models, side loading is also possible. Feel free to contact us by phone or via the contact form on our website for this.

compressible.name: Compressible
compressible.description: Portable wheelchairs or lightweight electric wheelchairs that fold from top to bottom

scooter.name: Scooter
scooter.description: Mobility scooters and heavy electric wheelchairs

VehicleMatches.loading-capacity-disclaimer: Limitation: for electric or hybrid vehicles, the battery pack may affect loading capacity. Please contact support.

PurchaseDisclaimer.title: Important note before purchasing a vehicle
PurchaseDisclaimer.paragraph-1: Please be sure to contact us once more before purchasing the vehicle – this way we can make sure together that everything works as intended.
PurchaseDisclaimer.paragraph-2: If you can't find your desired vehicle in the results, this is usually due to one of two reasons: either (1) the wheelchair measurements you entered are too large for this vehicle, or (2) we haven't measured the vehicle yet. In this case, feel free to reach out to us – we'll find a suitable solution for you.
PurchaseDisclaimer.paragraph-3: You can also check your desired model yourself at any time using our compatibility check:

SearchScopeNotice.title: Note on search scope
SearchScopeNotice.text: This vehicle search only checks models produced up to today or through {year}.

EmailMatchesDialog.title: Send results by email
EmailMatchesDialog.something-went-wrong: Something went wrong. Please contact support

VehicleMatches.subject: Your matching vehicles
VehicleMatches.greeting-full: Hello {firstName} {lastName}, here are the vehicles that match your wheelchair
VehicleMatches.greeting-second-part: Here are the vehicles that match your wheelchair:
